title: New Publication in Immunology and Cell Biology
content: Louis Richez and Dr. Khadra published a new study titled "The Geometry of pMHC-Coated Nanoparticles and T Cell Receptor Clusters Governs the Sensitivity-Specificity Trade-off in T Cell Response: A Modeling Investigation" in Immunology and Cell Biology.

title: New Publication in Journal of Computational Neuroscience
content: Nils Koch, Yifan Zhao, and Dr. Khadra published a new study titled "Dendritic Interaction of Timescales in Afterdepolarization Potentials and Nonmonotonic Spike-Adding" in the Journal of Computational Neuroscience.

title: New Paper in iScience on Electrosensory Coding
content: In collaboration with the Chacron and Bashivan labs, our latest manuscript "Burst Firing Optimizes Invariant Coding of Natural Communication Signals by Electrosensory Neural Populations" has been published in iScience.

title: Nature Publication on Ca2+-Permeable AMPA Receptors
content: Our collaborative work with Dr. Bowie's lab titled "GluA2-Containing AMPA Receptors form a Continuum of Ca2+-Permeable Channels" has been published in Nature.

title: Action Potentials Contribution to EEG in PLoS Comp Bio
content: Niklas Brake and Dr. Khadra published a new paper titled "Contributions of Action Potentials to Scalp EEG: Theory and Biophysical Simulations" in PLoS Computational Biology.
